style_summary: A black-background food promotion style built around one irregular cream paper card, oversized hand-brushed Chinese lettering, clipped food photography, small price medallions, warm red/yellow accents, and a handmade street-snack print texture.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: food item or plated dish shown as the main sales focus
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: food-specific action, garnish motion, utensil lift, or serving moment
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: bowl, plate, cup, spoon, chopsticks, sauce, garnish, steam, or serving prop
environment_variables.LOCATION: implied food-stall, tea-shop, dessert-shop, or street-snack context
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: different irregular card silhouette, small tags, side seals, paper labels, and secondary decorative marks
environment_variables.MAIN_TEXT: large hand-brushed Chinese dish name or short food headline
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: small support copy, price marker, origin cue, taste note, or craft note
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: simple graphic accent such as yuan mark, star, dot, slash, small seal, or chopstick tick
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: not used for people; describe food styling, plating, garnish rhythm, and prop material instead
environment_variables.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: visible style traits that must remain present in every generated sample
environment_variables.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: literal source product, exact text, exact price, exact bowl composition, and identity marks to avoid

style_fidelity_anchors: Full black canvas with the graphic card floating as the only bright object.
One large cream or aged-paper irregular cutout card, with rounded handmade edges and a different silhouette per case.
Dense left-to-right poster hierarchy: large vertical Chinese brush lettering competes with a food photo and a price medallion.
Food is treated as a glossy clipped photo collage element, not a flat illustration.
Card interior uses warm cream, faded ochre, deep red, orange, brown, and black ink with limited palette discipline.
Oversized hand-brushed Chinese characters use uneven stroke width, ink pooling, and imperfect baseline alignment.
Small vertical seals, boxed side notes, handwritten craft tags, and tiny taste cues add street-stall density.
A circular or blob-like price badge sits near the food photo with bold red numerals and yuan marks.
A deep red bottom ribbon or capsule callout carries short white lettering.
Edges have rough paper grain, slight shadow, scanned poster texture, and low-gloss print finish.
Composition feels handmade, crowded, appetizing, and local-market promotional rather than clean corporate packaging.
Every case preserves the black negative space plus irregular-card system while changing the dish, card silhouette, text, and prop arrangement.
source_content_to_avoid: Do not recreate chenpi red bean soup, red bean paste, or a wooden bowl of dark red dessert.
Do not reuse the exact Chinese text from the reference, including Chen Pi, Hong Dou Sha, WOW, or the original bottom slogan.
Do not use the exact price of 8 yuan as the main badge.
Do not copy the same spoon dripping dark paste into the same bowl position.
Do not reproduce the same cream card outline, same vertical text arrangement, or same red bottom banner shape.
Do not include any creator watermark, platform mark, QR code, brand logo, or signature.
Do not turn the result into a clean restaurant menu, realistic product packshot, or generic social-media template.

visual_deconstruction.style_category: handmade Chinese street-food ad card with photo-collage food centerpiece
visual_deconstruction.composition_logic: black outer negative space frames a single bright irregular card; heavy type on one side, appetizing food photo on the other, price badge above or beside the dish, red callout strip along the lower edge
visual_deconstruction.subject_placement: dish photo is medium-large and overlaps the cream card interior; text blocks press close to it without clean modern spacing
visual_deconstruction.perspective: food photography uses shallow three-quarter tabletop perspective while the card and typography remain flat poster graphics
visual_deconstruction.texture: aged paper grain, slightly rough cutout edge, ink bleed, uneven brush marks, and scanned print softness
visual_deconstruction.mood: cheap, handmade, local, warm, loud, snack-shop persuasive, with playful market energy

composition.canvas: Keep the outer canvas pure black and quiet so the cream cutout reads as a food-card object.
composition.card: Use one asymmetric cream paper card with a unique silhouette for each case, such as scalloped cloud, slanted ticket, peanut capsule, folded shield, gourd plaque, or torn label.
composition.hierarchy: Balance oversized brush text, the food photo, a price bubble, tiny side tags, and a bottom red ribbon in a crowded but legible poster cluster.
composition.ratio_behavior: For 9:16, stack text and food vertically inside a taller card; for 16:9, stretch the card sideways with text mass left and food mass right.

typography.main: Use large hand-brushed Chinese characters with dark brown or red-brown ink, uneven pressure, thick and thin strokes, and visible handmade wobble.
typography.secondary: Use small vertical notes, compact boxed labels, mini seals, and short craft copy in black, red, or brown.
typography.price: Render a bold yuan price marker in a round or blob badge, with red numerals on warm cream or orange.
typography.callout: Place a deep red ribbon or capsule at the bottom with short white hand-painted text.

color_palette.background: near-black or pure black outside the card
color_palette.paper: warm cream, aged ivory, light rice-paper yellow
color_palette.accent: ochre orange, mustard yellow, seal red, deep callout red
color_palette.food: natural glossy food colors kept richer than the flat paper palette
color_palette.proportion: about 55 percent cream card, 25 percent black negative space, 12 percent dark ink, 8 percent red/yellow accents

image_treatment.food_rendering: Use realistic clipped food photography with glossy sauce, steam, toppings, and utensil highlights, pasted onto the flat card like a printed ad collage.
image_treatment.graphic_rendering: Keep card, badges, labels, and lettering flat, handmade, and lightly distressed.
image_treatment.lighting: Soft warm tabletop highlights on the food, flat even light on paper graphics, strong separation against black.
image_treatment.finish: Slight scanned poster softness, paper grain, imperfect cut edges, and subtle shadow beneath the card.

design_rules: Always use a black outer background and one irregular cream cutout card.
Make each case use a visibly different card silhouette and different placement rhythm.
Keep the subject as a food item, dessert, snack, noodle, bun, drink, or plated dish.
Use large hand-brushed Chinese type as a dominant graphic ingredient.
Include a food photo collage element, price badge, small vertical side notes, and red bottom callout.
Keep the design crowded and tactile without becoming a full menu board.
do: Preserve the handmade Chinese snack-ad energy and black negative-space framing.
Change dish, text, price, card outline, and prop arrangement for every sample.
Use short Chinese copy, taste notes, price medallions, and tiny craft labels.
Let the food look appetizing and photographic while the card remains flat and printed.
avoid: Avoid copying the original red bean dessert, exact text, exact price, or same spoon-and-bowl composition.
Avoid clean vector menu design, Western cafe minimalism, corporate brand templates, or glossy app UI aesthetics.
Avoid white backgrounds outside the card, square modern cards, uniform card shapes, or identical layouts across cases.
Avoid watermarks, QR codes, social handles, platform logos, or real brand names.
prompt_template: Create a {ASPECT_RATIO} promotional food poster in the "Black Cutout Food Card Ad" visual style. Subject: {SUBJECT}. Action: {SUBJECT_ACTION}. Product or prop: {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}. Location context: {LOCATION}. Background and card details: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Main text: {MAIN_TEXT}. Secondary text: {SECONDARY_TEXT}. Accent symbol: {ACCENT_SYMBOL}. Food styling: {WARDROBE_STYLE}. Style fidelity anchors: {STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS}. Source content to avoid: {SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID}. Apply these rules: pure black outer background; a single warm cream irregular cutout card with handmade rounded or torn edges; each card silhouette must be visibly different from other cases; dense Chinese street-food ad hierarchy; oversized rough hand-brushed Chinese lettering; realistic clipped food photo collage placed on the flat card; bold yuan price medallion with a value that is not 8; tiny vertical side seals and craft labels; deep red bottom ribbon with short white lettering; ochre, mustard, seal red, dark brown ink, warm cream paper, paper grain, slight scan softness, subtle card shadow. Match the reference style first, then change the dish, text, prop, card outline, price, and layout details.
negative_prompt: chenpi red bean soup, red bean paste, wooden bowl of dark dessert, exact source Chinese text, WOW, price 8, spoon dripping dark paste, identical card outline, identical bottom slogan, modern menu layout, white outer background, clean corporate packaging, minimal cafe poster, generic food delivery app template, QR code, watermark, logo, brand mark, social handle, rendered UI, SVG look, vector-only substitute

values.SUBJECT: a lacquer bowl of Sichuan sesame cold noodles with cucumber threads and chili oil
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: chopsticks lift a glossy ribbon of noodles above the bowl
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: black chopsticks, sesame sauce swirl, chili oil droplets, small peanut crumb pile
values.LOCATION: busy neighborhood noodle stall implied only through handmade labels
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: a tall scalloped cloud-shaped cream card, small red seal near the headline, narrow vertical craft tags on the right edge
values.SECONDARY_TEXT: ¥12 今日拌好 辣香醒胃
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: cool noodles styled glossy and tangled, cucumber green accents, red chili shine, lacquer bowl shadow
values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: black canvas, irregular cream card, large brush Chinese lettering, clipped food photo, price badge, red bottom callout, small vertical labels, paper grain
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no red bean dessert, no chenpi text, no price 8, no dripping spoon, no same card silhouette

values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: a peanut-shaped horizontal cream card with two bulging lobes, round orange price badge on the upper left, torn side tag on the lower right
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: soft purple taro mound, creamy white highlights, glossy dessert cup, cool mist hints
values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: black canvas, irregular cream card, large brush Chinese lettering, clipped food photo, price badge, red bottom callout, small vertical labels, paper grain
values.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: no red bean soup, no original slogans, no price 8, no wooden bowl, no duplicate spoon-drip composition

values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: brown paper tray, bamboo tongs, sesame sprinkle, small soy-vinegar dipping saucer
values.LOCATION: street breakfast cart hinted by stamp-like morning labels

values.WARDROBE_STYLE: golden crisp pancake texture, browned edges, green scallion specks, warm oil sheen
values.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: black canvas, irregular cream card, large brush Chinese lettering, clipped food photo, price badge, red bottom callout, small vertical labels, paper grain
